headline: US House of Representatives Votes At 2 AM To Give Immunity To Uber For Accidents Caused By Its Drivers, Says Consumer Watchdog
summary: In a holiday weekend assault on consumer rights, the House of Representatives Transportation and Infrastructure Committee voted at 2 AM to give virtual immunity to Uber for accidents caused by its drivers.

headline: Uber explores takeover of European food delivery rival Delivery Hero - Bloomberg
summary: Investing.com -- Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER) is exploring options for a full takeover of European delivery giant Delivery Hero AG (ETR:DHER), Bloomberg reported Friday, citing people familiar with the matter. The strategic move is intended to help the ride-hailing company better compete with DoorDash Inc (NASDAQ:DASH) outside the United States. The news comes after the San Francisco-based giant disclosed this week that it had rapidly boosted its stake in Frankfurt-listed Delivery Hero. Wor

headline: How To Drive A 44% Return From Uber Stock That's Moving Rangebound
summary: Uber stock has been slumping despite the company's strong sales forecasts. It's possible the stock will stay rangebound for the next few weeks making an iron condor a top options strategy for consideration.  Let's look at how we might set up an iron condor on Uber stock.  An iron condor can be set up by combining a bull put spread and a bear call spread.

headline: Consumer Watchdog Report: Uber Plan To Limit Accident Liability Aims To Free Up Insurance Reserves
summary: A new report by Consumer Watchdog warns that Uber has nearly doubled the size of its self-funded insurance reserves since 2023 with an eye toward funding its robocar rollout should it succeed in plans to limit its liability for auto accidents in California and across the nation. This report was first covered by the LA Times.

This report was first covered by the LA Times.
